title: The U.S.-Iran Deal: What to Know
summary_full: The full text of the deal that could pave the way to ending the war has not been published. Initial details suggest that it defers the most contentious issues.
summary_public: The full text of the deal that could pave the way to ending the war has not been published. Initial details suggest that it defers the most contentious issues.
